title: OAuth Redirect URL not updating correctly
symptom: The redirect URL for OAuth is missing the 'https://' prefix, causing authentication issues.
not_this_if: Redirect URL is correct and includes 'https://'
root_cause: The issue arises when the wrong environment variable is referenced in the Docker Compose file, leading to an incorrect redirect URL being set for OAuth authentication.
fix_steps: Open the Docker Compose file used to deploy n8n.
agent_instruction: Update the Docker Compose file to reference the correct environment variable for the redirect URL.
